home.heroSubtitle: Sofas, bedrooms and dining pieces built in warm, minimal forms — every detail considered for the way you actually live.
home.categoriesSubtitle: Find the right piece for every room
home.storyBody: Furnituremodern is a Tbilisi-based studio building modern, long-lasting furniture from solid oak, walnut and natural fabrics. Every piece is produced in small batches, hand-finished, and inspected for fit before it leaves the workshop.

consent.title: Cookies
consent.body: We only set cookies that are strictly necessary for the site to work. Optional analytics are loaded only after you give consent.
